response.justification: While the candidate has roughly 20 years of varied software engineering experience and recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and a demonstrated track record of advising strategic customers and shaping cloud/AI strategy at scale. Bogdan's titles have consistently remained at the Senior/Staff level, his AI work spans only six months at a single employer, and there is no evidence of the strategic influence, thought leadership, or large-scale AI product ownership the position requires. The current caregiving career gap and lack of an advanced AI-related degree further widen the gap against the preferred qualifications.
strengths: Approximately 20 years of continuous software engineering spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial track record demonstrated by founding GISCollective and delivering open-source tooling used in production by NGOs
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
concerns: No director-level or strategic leadership experience; titles plateau at Senior/Staff with no evidence of advising customers, influencing roadmaps, or shaping organizational AI strategy
AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to six months at re:cinq with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale, and no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field

Cloud expertise is narrow (AWS CDK for a pricing module) rather than broad cloud architecture or platform strategy; no evidence of engaging with cloud vendors or strategic partners at an advisory level
